They also had a 2-1 loss to Russia in a friendly. Their qualification matches had a 3-0 win over North Korea, a 1-0 loss to Qatar, and a 2-0 win over UAE. Their form seems a bit more consistent with more wins, but they have some heavy losses.

Looking at the goals scored and conceded averages. Egypt scores 1.33 per game, concedes 0.87. Iran scores 1.73, concedes 0.8. So Iran is more attack-oriented, but both have solid defenses. Egypt's attack is slightly less effective.

So their form is more variable.
